creator: tijl@FreeBSD.org
text: That's because of your ppd file then.  If it says the printer cannot accept PDF directly then cups has to run the PDF it gets from an application through a (series of) filter(s) to convert the file to whatever format the printer does support.  In the ports tree several printer driver ports like gutenprint or hplip have a dependency on cups-filters because of this so users get it that way.  Maybe you can create such a port for Kyocera printers.
